projectDescription: A unified real-time data platform combining distributed stream processing with an in-memory data store for low-latency, high-throughput data applications.
keyFeatures: Distributed in-memory IMap with querying, event listeners, and caching patterns (read/write-through, write-behind)
Built-in Jet stream processing engine for real-time and batch data pipelines
Distributed SQL queries over IMap, Kafka, and file sources powered by Apache Calcite
CP Subsystem with linearizable data structures (IAtomicLong, ISemaphore, ICountDownLatch) based on Raft consensus
Comprehensive connector library: Kafka, Hadoop, S3, RDBMS, JMS, and more
WAN replication for multi-datacenter and multi-region deployments
Hot restart persistence for cluster recovery without data loss
Vector search capabilities for ML/AI-driven workloads
Tiered storage combining in-memory and disk-based storage
Client libraries in Java, Python, Node.js, .NET, C++, and Go
publicApiSurface: HazelcastInstance — entry point for all Hazelcast services
IMap<K,V> — concurrent, distributed, queryable key-value store
SqlService#execute(String sql, Object... arguments) — distributed SQL execution
JetService#newJob(Pipeline pipeline) — submit a stream/batch processing job
Pipeline — fluent API to build data processing pipelines
Sources — factory for batch and streaming pipeline sources (IMap, Kafka, files, JDBC, JMS, sockets)
Sinks — factory for pipeline sinks (IMap, files, JDBC, JMS, Kafka)
Job — handle to a submitted Jet computation job
CPSubsystem — access to CP (strongly consistent) data structures
IAtomicLong / IAtomicReference / ISemaphore / ICountDownLatch — CP primitives
Config / XmlConfigBuilder / YamlConfigBuilder — programmatic and file-based cluster configuration
VectorDocument / SearchOptions — vector similarity search API
DataConnectionService — manage external data connections for SQL and Jet pipelines
